case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. MATTHEW S DOUGLAS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF COUNSEL RE: 1. INTEREST, 2. COSTS (CCP 1033), 3. ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100067068) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, MATTHEW S $2,965.74 PRINCIPAL, $284.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,250.24, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100067068)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-11-2018 CONTINUED TO MAY-14-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, MATTHEW S SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-29-2018
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-11-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100055749), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. SERVED JUL-21-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION, MAILING DATE JUL-24-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, MATTHEW S
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100062291) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, MATTHEW S

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $284.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100067068) AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, MATTHEW S
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100048738) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, MATTHEW S

AMENDED SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100066718), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. SERVED JUL-21-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JUL-24-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, MATTHEW S
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-14-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
